topology.rule: three facilities form a triangle around the Tarai Current; Gates of Justice redirect and control access to the current

temporal_logic.note: This is the pre-timeskip Marineford headquarters configuration. After Chapter 598, Marine Headquarters has moved; New Marineford must not be inserted into the old Tarai triangle.
temporal_logic.post_timeskip_rule: Keep old Marineford as a historical/former node; do not connect New Marineford to this triangle without new evidence.

visual_program.master_scene: One relational system scene with separate collections for facilities, gates, current, atmosphere, and chapter-state variants.
sketch_order: triangle/current diagram using relationships, not atlas jitter
distributed Gate of Justice structures and directed water flow
must_show: three different facilities surrounding one current system
Impel Down extending underwater rather than reading as an ordinary island
Gates of Justice as access infrastructure, not a standalone island
Tarai Current as connective motion and topology
must_not_show: New Marineford substituted into the historical triangle
straight connections between independently jittered atlas coordinates presented as canon

unresolved: Exact cartographic bearings and scale between the three facilities.
Whether the runtime representation is a geographically expanded inset or a chapter-triggered local system scene.
Post-timeskip visual state of the old Tarai system beyond Marineford's headquarters move.
